no_claim_reason: Same-server timing is measured directly on one host and the artifact emits checker/waveform accuracy gates. Paper-facing speed claims should use only accuracy-gated rows and still need repeated cold/warm runs.
evas_only_no_claim_reason: EVAS-only speed experiments are candidate evidence; paper-facing speed claims require same-slice EVAS/Spectre timing.
